pageContext.name: Rudolph in Red Pickup
pageContext.description: Handcrafted Rudolph Traditions figurines and Christmas tree ornaments combine familiar characters with Jim Shore's unique folk art and quilting style. Fans of all ages will enjoy these new interpretations of Rudolph and his friends. With rosy cheeks, Santa gives a friendly wave as he drives an impressively decorated red pickup truck through town. Adorned with a wreath, patchwork and stars, the truck transports Rudolph and friends in style. Destination bound for Christmas!
